thingsvis-widget-geo-map.name: Map Location
thingsvis-widget-geo-map.deviceLatitudeDesc: Switch to field mode and pick the latitude field from ThingsPanel device data
thingsvis-widget-geo-map.deviceLongitudeDesc: Switch to field mode and pick the longitude field from ThingsPanel device data
thingsvis-widget-geo-map.deviceMarkerTitleDesc: Optional. Pick a device name or label field from device data
